# Contributing

Thank you for your interest in contributing to the **SOC Analyst Field Manual**.

This project is focused on practical, defensive cybersecurity knowledge. Contributions should improve documentation, clarify investigation methodologies, or add defensive techniques.

## Goals

- Improve technical accuracy
- Maintain professional writing
- Follow industry best practices
- Keep documentation beginner friendly while remaining useful for experienced analysts

## Types of Contributions

- Documentation improvements
- Investigation workflows
- Detection engineering
- Sigma Rules
- Splunk Searches
- Microsoft Sentinel KQL
- PowerShell
- Bash
- Windows Event Analysis
- MITRE ATT&CK Mapping

## Before Opening a Pull Request

Please ensure:

- Grammar has been reviewed.
- Sources are accurate.
- Information is defensive in nature.
- Markdown renders correctly.
- No copyrighted material has been copied.

## Code Style

Use markdown formatting.

Use fenced code blocks.

Include comments when appropriate.

## Reporting Issues

If something is inaccurate or outdated, please open an Issue before submitting major changes.

Thank you for helping improve defensive cybersecurity education.
